Bash("C:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\bin\\gh.exe" release create v1.3.10 --title "v1.3.10" --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes
- **Fix Klipper watchdog crash**: Move network scanning to separate FreeRTOS task to prevent watchdog timeouts
- **Full subnet scanning**: Scan all IPs \(1-254\) instead of limited .100-.120 range - finds printers at any IP address
- **Improved task management**: Use vTaskDelay\(\) for proper task yielding during scan operations
- **Thread safety**: Add volatile flags for safe communication between scan task and main loop
EOF
\)" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\firmware.bin" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\littlefs.bin")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\bin\\gh.exe" release create v1.3.11 --title "v1.3.11" --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes
- **Multi-port scanning**: Now checks ports 7125 \(default Moonraker\), 80 \(nginx proxy\), and 4408 \(Creality/alternative\)
- Fixes discovery of printers using nginx reverse proxy \(Mainsail/Fluidd on port 80\)
EOF
\)" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\firmware.bin")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\bin\\gh.exe" release create v1.3.12 --title "v1.3.12" --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes
- **Fix garbled display**: Draw initial scanning screen with full refresh before starting network operations
- **Progress bar updates**: Progress bar now updates every 500ms during scanning
- Small delay after initial draw to let e-ink complete before WiFi operations start
EOF
\)" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\firmware.bin")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\bin\\gh.exe" release create v1.3.13 --title "v1.3.13" --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes
- **Fix huge font on copyright pages**: The EPUB parser was detecting CSS classes containing "title" \(like "title-page-contributor"\) as chapter headers, causing text to render in 24pt font instead of normal 9pt
- More specific chapter detection now requires "chapter", "chap-", "heading", or "section-title" in class names
EOF
\)" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\firmware.bin")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\bin\\gh.exe" release create v1.3.14 --title "v1.3.14" --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes
- **Fix chapter body rendering as huge text**: The EPUB parser was matching CSS classes like "heading" and "chapter" on wrapper divs, causing all content inside to render as headers
- Now only matches very specific title classes: "chapter-title", "chap-title", "section-title", "part-title"
- Actual `<h1>`-`<h6>` header tags are handled separately and still work correctly
EOF
\)" "c:\\Users\\Ron\\Downloads\\DEV\\Book32-TRMNL\\Book32\\.pio\\build\\seeed_xiao_esp32s3\\firmware.bin")
